forecasts.detailed: Isolated rain showers. Cloudy, with a high near 46. South wind around 5 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
Scattered rain showers before 5pm. Cloudy, with a high near 45. South wind around 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
Partly sunny, with a high near 56. South wind 9 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph.

Scattered rain showers after 3pm. Cloudy, with a high near 44. South wind around 15 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
Scattered rain showers before 1pm. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 51. South wind 6 to 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
Mostly sunny, with a high near 63. Southwest wind around 2 mph.
